title: Human-Orchestrator Dialogue Event
description: Records a message exchanged between the human ratifier/operator and the Orchestrator via the cockpit — a question, an answer, a directive, or a status query. This is the audit trail for human-in-the-loop control. A message with requires_response=true is an open obligation surfaced in the cockpit until a paired reply event references it via related_event_id.

participant.description: Human identity (Evans / Engineering Lead) on the human side of the exchange

requires_response.description: True when this message opens an obligation that a paired reply must close

related_event_id.description: event_id this message replies to / references

dual_recommendation_attached.description: True when an orchestrator_to_human question carries the CLAUDE.md dual-recommendation two-pass evidence (Claude + Codex Pass-1 + Pass-2)
